title: Compare 3 ways to push real-time data
meta_description: Choose SSE for dashboards, WebSockets for chat, long polling as fallback — benchmarked on Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 with real cost and latency numbers.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for real-time and burn 3x the bandwidth.

SSE is simpler, cheaper, and works behind any proxy.

Here is the data 👇
